title: Immunization (CVX) -> drug_exposure, no RxNorm crosswalk (drug_concept_id 0)
notes: A point-in-time vaccination is mapped to a single drug_exposure row. The stage-1 view (Immunization__drug_exposure.view.json) reads vaccineCode.coding.where(system='http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/cvx').code as the CVX code, occurrence.ofType(dateTime), status, patient (->person_id), and encounter (->visit_occurrence_id). Stage-2 SQL (Immunization__drug_exposure.sql) prefers CVX over RxNorm, then resolves the source code in vocab.concept and LEFT JOINs 'Maps to' -> standard Drug. CVX code '08' resolves to vocab concept_id 2000000029 ('hepatitis B vaccine, pediatric or pediatric/adolescent dosage', vocabulary_id=CVX, domain_id=Drug, standard_concept IS NULL i.e. non-standard, invalid_reason NULL i.e. valid, valid_start 2024-12-16). In the loaded May-2026 Athena bundle this CVX concept has NO 'Maps to' relationship to a standard RxNorm/RxNorm-Extension Drug, so COALESCE(std.concept_id,0) yields drug_concept_id=0. drug_source_concept_id is still the CVX concept 2000000029 and drug_source_value is the raw CVX code '08' (left(...,50)). This matches the actual pipeline output for the real Synthea Immunization b63e46bf-687d-9c46-bd9c-4c5f8f18f9e1 (cdm_ours_fhir.drug_exposure: drug_concept_id=0, drug_source_value='08', drug_source_concept_id=2000000029, drug_type_concept_id=32827 'EHR encounter record', start=end=2017-12-05). drug_type_concept_id is the constant 32827 (verified standard Type Concept). start_date=end_date=2017-12-05 and the *_datetime columns carry the full occurrenceDateTime 2017-12-05T10:40:30 (timezone normalized). status='completed' passes the WHERE filter that drops 'entered-in-error'/'not-done'. The view does NOT read Immunization.location, so no provider_id (location is not a Practitioner reference and the edge maps no provider) -> provider_id NULL. Every drug_exposure column the stage-2 SELECT sets to NULL (verbatim_end_date, stop_reason, refills, quantity, days_supply, sig, route_concept_id, lot_number, provider_id, visit_detail_id, route_source_value, dose_unit_source_value) is asserted NULL.

omop.drug_source_concept_id__name: hepatitis B vaccine, pediatric or pediatric/adolescent dosage
